## BEM-921 completed | 2026-05-30

Result: SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS. Protocol is full-system, not Telegram-only. It includes the correct inner contour algorithm Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision cycles through Analyst, workspace ownership by internal contour, curator as object role/element, no local individual element rules, vertical curator-to-curator links, horizontal Auditor A -> Analyst B links, GitHub Actions/runners as activation/proof mechanisms, managed channel and event log transition recording, Telegram as one module with registered curator routes and main GD Curator route. Prompt appendix includes object prompts, role templates, contour overlays and channel/runner operational contracts.
